_note: Baseline SHA-256 digests of the upstream A2A artefacts we derive our Zod schemas from. Checked weekly by .github/workflows/spec-drift.yml — on drift an issue opens and a maintainer updates the Zod schemas + this file together. The placeholder hashes below are filled on the first successful run; the workflow flags them as 'changed' so the first manual dispatch establishes the real baseline.

a2a-json-schema.description: Canonical A2A JSON schema (agent card, task, message, error codes).
